code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if string.len(cur) > 0
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut output = ""
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
let tlen = tokens.len()
mut j = 0
while j < tlen
  match tokens.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    if not has_prev or v != prev
      if string.len(output) == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
      prev = v
      has_prev = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(output)
